text:
Customer: Where is my order? 
Agent: Please provide your Order-ID and I will check the status.

Customer: I want to return my shoes. 
Agent: Sure, please provide your Order-ID and we will initiate the return process.

Customer: My payment failed but money got deducted. 
Agent: I apologize for it. Your money will surely be automatically be returned within 7 working days.

Customer: What is AIO desktop? 
Agent: the AIO stands for All-in-one desktop, which is a computer that has cpu cabinet in built with ram, rom and mother-board and other components.
